title: 3 Reliable Dividend Stocks to Buy In the Market Dip

title: Welltower (WELL) Q2 2022 Earnings Highlights
text: Welltower (WELL) recently announced its Q2 2022 financial results. These are the details.

title: Welltower Inc. (WELL) CEO Shankh Mitra on Q2 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Welltower Inc. (NYSE:WELL ) Q2 2022 Earnings Conference Call August 10, 2022 9:00 AM ET Company Participants Matt McQueen - General Counsel Shankh Mitra - Chief Executive Officer John Burkart - Chief Operating Officer Tim McHugh - Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Michael Bilerman - Citigroup Vikram Malhotra - Mizuho Daniel Bernstein - Capital One Jonathan Hughes - Raymond James Austin Wurschmidt - KeyBanc Capital Markets Derek Johnston - Deutsche Bank John Pawlowski - Green Street Steven Valiquette - Barclays Michael Mueller - JPMorgan David Rodgers - Baird Nicholas Yulico - Scotiabank Richard Anderson - SMBC Michael Carroll - RBC Capital Markets Juan Sanabria - BMO Capital Markets Operator Good morning. My name is Chantal, and I'll be your conference operator today.

title: Welltower (WELL) Q2 FFO & Revenues Beat, SHOP Occupancy Up
text: Welltower's (WELL) Q2 results outpace estimates with solid top-line growth. The seniors housing operating portfolio occupancy witnesses significant improvements year over year.

title: Welltower (WELL) Tops Q2 FFO and Revenue Estimates
text: Welltower (WELL) delivered FFO and revenue surprises of 1.18% and 3.46%, respectively, for the quarter ended June 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: These Are The 10 Biggest Companies Revealing Earnings Next Week
text: About 56% of the S&P 500 companies have reported their quarterly earnings as of last week.
